title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 701.379 - Appeal from chief safety inspector's decisions, procedure
text:
701.379.  Appeal from chief safety inspector's decisions, procedure. — 1.  Any aggrieved person may appeal any decision of any state inspector to the chief safety inspector of the state.  Any appeal of a decision of the chief safety inspector shall be taken as provided in chapter 536.
  2.  Any person aggrieved by a decision of a municipal inspector may appeal such decision to the municipality in accordance with municipal ordinances.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1035 § 9)
